name: Financio
description: Personal finance management platform with intuitive dashboards and smart insights.
longDescription: Financio helps users understand spending, savings, and financial goals through clean dashboards and actionable insights — built with the same product discipline applied to enterprise software.
highlights: Built for clarity and daily use

caseStudy.challenge: Personal finance tools often overwhelm users with complexity. The goal was clarity — help people understand their money without friction.
caseStudy.solution: Built a focused SaaS experience with clean dashboards, thoughtful categorization, and a mobile-first layout that prioritizes the most important numbers first.
caseStudy.outcome: A live platform at financio.pro that turns financial data into actionable daily insights.

architecture.summary: Full-stack SaaS with a Next.js frontend and Node.js API backed by MongoDB for flexible financial document storage.

layers.name: Backend
layers.role: REST APIs, business rules, user sessions

layers.name: Database
layers.role: Flexible schema for transactions and user data
